privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task requires generating a synthetic PySAM script for a residential system in Phoenix, AZ, explicitly targeting output paths /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/bill_savings_analysis.py and /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/phoenix_bill_savings.json. Manual calculations using standard PySAM parameters and the tiered utility rate precisely bound the expected outputs: PVWatts energy yields ~12,181 kWh (within [10000, 13500]), no-solar bills cost ~$1,547 (within [1100, 1900]), solar bills cost ~$150-$300 (within [50, 600]), savings sit around ~$1,347 (within [700, 1700]), and simple payback is ~10.9 years (within [6, 18]). However, I discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable because 'task_result.json' is never formally verified against these required constraint ranges.
